name: io.github.kanafm/arxiv-hound
description: Tiny arXiv MCP server: search, fetch, cite. Pairs arXiv with Semantic Scholar for TLDRs, similar papers, and citation graphs.

environmentVariables.name: ARXIV_HOUND_CACHE
environmentVariables.description: Override the cache directory for paper markdown.

environmentVariables.name: ARXIV_HOUND_S2_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits.
